mapper.sql: id, biz_type, title, content_url, send_type, status, create_time, expire_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message (biz_type, title, content_url, send_type, status, create_time, expire_time) VALUES (#{bizType}, #{title}, #{contentUrl}, #{sendType.code}, #{status.code}, #{createTime}, #{expireTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND status < #{status}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(m.id), 0) FROM message m JOIN message_feed_mapping mfm ON m.id = mfm.message_id WHERE mfm.feed_type = #{feedType}
